caption: A man stands at a wooden podium in a room with wood-paneled walls and horizontal blinds, addressing a seated audience. He wears a white shirt, a dark vest with red accents, and glasses. The audience, seen from behind, includes individuals wearing maroon and dark-colored clothing. In the initial sequence, the man is seen from the chest up, looking down at papers on the podium. As the sequence progresses, the camera view widens to a long shot, revealing more of the room and additional audience members. A second man in a grey shirt is visible seated to the left of the podium in the later frames. The text "ORCA" appears in white letters inside a white box on the right side of every frame. The man at the podium remains centered, continuing his presentation as the perspective shifts.
